prompt: TRUE chunky pixel-art ability icon only, exact 32×32 logical pixel grid rendered large. Pinpoint Shot: SIMPLE compact glyph — one horizontal steel-blue arrow through a SMALL red-and-cream bullseye ring (only 2 rings), with one crisp impact notch. The entire subject must fit inside a ~24–28 logical-pixel box in the CENTER. Leave a wide empty #ff00ff magenta border — at least FIVE full magenta cells clear on every edge. Flat square pixels only, structures ≥3 pixels, selective charcoal-plum outline, upper-left light. Source-local steel blue, red rings, cream fletching, deep forest shadow. Solid #ff00ff background. No person, text, UI frame, scenery, shadow, aura, particles, gradients, anti-aliasing, blur, dithering, watermark, or transparency.

acquisition_flatten.note: Task-local acquisition flatten (knight/wizard pattern); production ingest_raw_to_local_text_source unchanged.
